description: This slot is for items you want to display above recovery items.
name: -----Reserve
Pretty Seashell
note:
<Memories> 

<Text:A pretty seashell I found while doing laundry.
I remember finding something similar when I was a kid
and being overjoyed...
>
<Hint:Hint...
During CHAPTER:1, talk to Elly by the river in the morning.>
<SD:000>

name: Tattered Ribbon
note:
<Memories> 
<Text:A bright red ribbon that Elly gave to Mana long ago.
Mana was so happy with it that she kept it on her at all times,
using it happily no matter what.
...Because of that, it quickly became tattered.
Even though it's unusable now, she still treasures this ribbon.
>
<Hint:Hint...
Check the cupboard in Mana's house.>
<SD:003>

name: Sun-bleached Signboard
note:
<Memories> 
<Text:That day Mana and I left the village,
Elly was leaning against this sign, waiting for us to return.
It was the first time either Mana or I had left the village,
so we were both in high spirits, having a fun time.
Without even noticing her anxious face...
>
<Hint:Hint...
From CHAPTER:2 onward, talk to the soldier at the south entrance on a sunny morning.>
<SD:004>

name: Dirty Children's Underwear
note:
<Memories> 
<Text:Mana's underwear, stained with white marks and smelling awful.
The dirt and smell are concentrated especially in the crotch area.
I remember there was an incident where those girls' underwear went missing...
I never thought I'd find them in this state.
...I'll keep quiet about this to Mana.
>
<Hint:Hint...
From CHAPTER:2 onward, check the bed in Dario's house.>
<SD:011>

name: Round Mud Ball
note:
<Memories> 
<Text:When we played house as children,
Mana would knead mud like this and make food for us.
Mana was always the mother, and Elly was the daughter.
She stubbornly insisted,
'I'm his sister, so I can't marry Big Brother!'
...But it was just pretend, so she didn't have to worry about it...
>
<Hint:Hint...
From CHAPTER:2 onward, check the wall of a house on a misty day.>
<SD:009>

name: Discarded Hair Tie
note:
<Memories> 
<Text:A scrunchie Mana gave to Dario for his birthday.
She said she wanted to try sewing,
and worked hard making it with Elly's help.
I definitely don't want her to find out
that this was thrown away outside...
>
<Hint:Hint...
Check near the cemetery in the northern forest.>
<SD:006>

name: Elly's Cookies
note:
<Memories> 
<Text:Cookies with a soft, sweet scent
that makes your stomach rumble just by smelling them.
These were the first sweets Elly ever made for me.
I can't remember the taste of my mother's snacks anymore,
but as long as I can eat the sweets she makes, that's enough.
>
<Hint:Hint...
From CHAPTER:2 onward, check the table in your own house during a stormy afternoon.>
<SD:007>

name: Hideout's Wild Strawberries
note:
<Memories> 
<Text:A secret place shared among childhood friends...
Hidden there was a patch of wild strawberries
that bore lots of sweet and sour, delicious fruit.
But at some point, Mana stopped going there.
Then Elly followed suit, and it wasn't fun for Dario and me anymore.
Eventually, no one went there.
...Because Dario said that thing...
>
<Hint:Hint...
Exit the village via the east entrance, head south on the road to the mansion, and proceed on the path to the hideout.>
<SD:010>

name: Small Pond After the Rain
note:
<Memories> 
<Text:Whenever the rain stopped, Mana would always visit the forest.
And she would sit right down in front of this puddle.
She would gaze intently at the forest creatures gathering by the water.
Seriously, her eyes sparkling all the while...
>
<Hint:Hint...
On a clear morning or afternoon, check the puddle in the northern forest.>
<SD:002_001>

name: Assembly Hall Ghost?
note:
<Memories> 
<Text:When we were kids, we were scared of this assembly hall.
We hated the dim atmosphere and the dusty smell,
and the adults strongly warned us not to go inside.
They said ghosts would come out, so children mustn't enter...
Having grown up being told that,
maybe that's why we saw something like that that day...
>
<Hint:Hint...
Check the assembly hall late at night.>
<SD:001>

name: Used Condom
note:
<Memories> 
<Text:...Why would this be thrown away in a place like this?
Come to think of it, I saw one here when I was a kid too...
I remember Mana found it back then,
and it caused a bit of a commotion...
>
<Hint:Hint...
Check the grove in the southeast part of the village on a cloudy day.>
<SD:005>

name: Shy Stray Cat
note:
<Memories> 
<Text:A cute, round stray cat that's been hanging around this village forever.
Everyone's liked it since long ago; it's the village's idol cat.
When we first met, it wouldn't warm up to me easily,
and I had a hard time just feeding it...
But by sticking with it patiently,
we somehow became really good friends...
>
<Hint:Hint...
On a non-stormy afternoon, talk to the cat near the tool shop.>
<SD:008>
